The '''''Iopene Princess''''' was a [[Mining Guild/Legends|Mining Guild]] [[Mining Guild cutter|cutter]]. She was outfitted with a state-of-the-art [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] as well as various scanners and probes.

During [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian's]] term as [[Baron Administrator/Legends|Baron Administrator]] of [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]], the ''Princess'' visited the city to collect Lando's annual bribe to keep the Guild from organizing his workers. A day before she was scheduled to leave, the droid [[EV-9D9/Legends|EV-9D9]] hijacked the ''Princess'', using explosives around the city's [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] generators as a distraction, and escaped the city, eventually reaching [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].

==Appearances==
*{{StoryCite|story=A Bad Feeling: The Tale of EV-9D9|book=Tales from Jabba's Palace}} {{1st}}
